description: Doc registry for built-in skills tied to mChatAI Fundamentals categories (spec docs/MCHATAI_FUNDAMENTALS.md §5.2 + §8). Source-of-truth for the `describe_skill(id)` MCP tool. Mirrors entries in Skills/SkillCatalog.swift but lives in mchatai-source so it ships hot.

skills.name: Dictionary Contains
skills.summary: Checks whether a word exists in a registered dictionary fundamental. Outputs 'true' or 'false' as the pipeline text plus a typed containsResult bool on the SkillData bag.

arguments.description: Word to look up. Falls back to the pipeline text when omitted.
Dictionary fundamental id. Defaults to 'english-5letter'. Call list_fundamentals to see available ids.

skills.name: Dictionary Suggest
skills.summary: Returns up to N words from a dictionary fundamental that begin with the given prefix. Useful for autocomplete and partial-match validation.

arguments.description: Prefix to match. Empty prefix returns the first N words alphabetically. Falls back to the pipeline text when omitted.

skills.name: Dictionary Random
skills.summary: Picks N random words from a dictionary fundamental (without replacement). Useful for daily-puzzle seeds, naming, mock data.

arguments.description: How many random words to return (1–100). Default 1.

skills.name: Unit Convert
skills.summary: Converts a numeric value between units in a unit-conversion fundamental (length/mass/volume/time). Linear-multiplicative tables only — temperature deferred until the data model supports non-linear conversions.

arguments.description: Unit-conversion fundamental id: length, mass, volume, or time.
Source unit id (e.g. 'mi', 'us-gal', 'ft', 'kg'). Call read_unit_conversion(<table>) to enumerate available unit ids.
Numeric value to convert. Falls back to pipeline text when omitted.

outputs.pipelineText: Converted value as a number string (e.g. '42.1648')
